name: run-to-completion
description: Run long-horizon Codex tasks through a resumable progress-tracked workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Run long tasks with resumable progress tracking
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin and skill for long-running goals. It adds a custom prompt entry point and a reusable skill that tracks phase progress, estimates, resume state, live dashboard files, and stop conditions.
defaultPrompt: Use /prompts:run-to-completion to work through a long task with progress tracking.
